title: Nursery Rhyme. CCCXXIII. Games.
content:
This is the key of the kingdom.
        In that kingdom there is a city.
        In that city there is a town.
        In that town there is a street.
        In that street there is a lane.
        In that lane there is a yard.
        In that yard there is a house.
        In that house there is a room.
        In that room there is a bed.
        On that bed there is a basket.
        In that basket there are some flowers.
        Flowers in the basket, basket in the bed, bed in the room, & c. & c.
meaning:
"Nursery Rhyme. CCCXXIII. Games." is a quintessential example of Unknown's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
